name: Lawnmower Game: Survival
short_description: Drive lawnmower at 15 different levels. Player have 60 seconds time to find coin and finish levels in this arcade racing
detailed_description:
Story:

Player control lawnmower in this survival racing game. 15 different themed levels. All has 60 seconds time to find coin and finish level and collect steam achievements. So can be you to be enough fast lawnmower driver and finish all levels in this awesome racing game. You  are only driver but player have only 60 seconds time to find coin and finish levels

Features:

-60 seconds time to finish tracks
- Amazing 15 tracks
- finish levels to get steam achievements

Controls:

- WASD =Movement
- Space = Handbrake
- Escape = back to menu select from tracks/levels
